candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure the knowledge utility floor before trusting any pattern or extraction approach.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Without a clear pattern type and knowledge scope, portfolio knowledge cannot compound.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Growth playbook from cross-portfolio KPI trend analysis shared as doctrine cards with evergreen relevance.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Cross-portfolio growth playbooks extracted from KPI trends produce the highest-utility evergreen doctrine.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Failure postmortem from single venture via founder interview synthesis shared as mentor brief with seasonal relevance.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Single-venture failure postmortems are most valuable when synthesized from founder interviews and shared as mentor briefs.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Pivot case study at industry-wide scope via benchmark comparison shared as playbook chapter with seasonal relevance.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Industry-wide pivot case studies benchmarked against comparable companies produce reusable playbook chapters.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Operational template from cross-portfolio agent observation shared as founder digest with evergreen relevance.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Agent-observed operational patterns across portfolios produce reusable templates that stay fresh when shared as digests.
